Modified: head/net/p5-Net-EPP/Makefile

+++ head/net/p5-Net-EPP/Makefile	Sat Sep 22 19:42:08 2012	(r304715)

 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Net-EPP
-PORTVERSION=	0.18
+PORTVERSION=	0.19
 CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -65,7 +65,4 @@ MAN3=	Net::EPP.3 \
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-post-patch:
-	    ${RM} ${WRKSRC}/lib/Net/EPP/Simple.pm.orig
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
